name: MAC Address
description: Detects MAC (Media Access Control) addresses in various formats (colon, hyphen, dot-separated). Colon-separated form requires a label keyword (mac, ether, hw-addr) because SSH MD5 fingerprints share the same 6×2-hex-colon syntax.

metadata.pattern_rationale: Colon-separated form changed to require label (mac/ether/hw-addr/link/ether) because SSH MD5 fingerprints (aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff:...) have the same 6-group colon-hex syntax. Hyphen-separated and Cisco dot-separated forms have no equivalent collision so they remain label-free.

effect.message: MAC address tokenized, OUI (vendor) prefix visible for de-identification
